page_content:
2 Students may, at the invitation of individual faculty, substitute

EDHD498, for three of the required 12 credit elective component. For situations in which students wish to pursue a double major, Family Science Majors may substitute FMSC302 for EDHD306, and Psychology Majors may substitute PSYC300 for EDHD306 and PSYC200 for EDMS451 in the Human Development major

3 Students may elect to substitute six credits of upper (400 level)

electives in place of the internship experience, although internship experience is strongly recommended.

4 Students may complete EDHD489 in one semester or over two

semesters. Students may also take EDHD489 for three credits and another 400-level elective for three credits in order to satisfy this requirement.
